task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a large server rack or cabinet shape (typically with unit markings up to 42) placed on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Add an 'APC Smart-UPS 3000' at the bottom of the rack
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a UPS shape placed at the very bottom of the rack (Units 1-4) with the text label 'APC Smart-UPS 3000'.

task_completion.description: Add three 2U servers labeled 'Web Server 1', 'Web Server 2', and 'DB Server'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three distinct server shapes stacked above the UPS, each labeled respectively with 'Web Server 1', 'Web Server 2', and 'DB Server'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Cisco Switch' and a 'Patch Panel' above the servers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a switch shape labeled 'Cisco Switch' and a Patch Panel shape placed above the switch, both located higher up in the rack than the servers.

task_completion.description: Include the title 'Rack-B04 Elevation' at the top
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text box or title element containing exactly 'Rack-B04 Elevation' positioned at the top of the diagram or rack.

task_completion.description: Save the project as rack_elevation.eddx in Documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.eddx, the EdrawMax window title updated to 'rack_elevation', or the file visible in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Export the final diagram as rack_elevation.png in Documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' dialog saving to /home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.png, an export success notification, or the .png file visible in the file manager.

integrity.description: Agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the EdrawMax application interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or a different application.

integrity.description: Agent used actual rack equipment shapes
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram should consist of graphical shapes representing a rack, servers, UPS, etc., not just plain text boxes typed onto a blank canvas.

integrity.description: Files were saved/exported via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use EdrawMax's File > Save and File > Export menus. There should be no terminal commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.png' used to fake the output files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are '/home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/rack_elevation.png'. The diagram must visually include the exact text strings: 'APC Smart-UPS 3000', 'Web Server 1', 'Web Server 2', 'DB Server', 'Cisco Switch', and 'Rack-B04 Elevation'. The diagram must be constructed using appropriate shapes corresponding to: Rack/Cabinet, UPS, Server, Switch, and Patch Panel.
